_comment: REFERENCE ONLY — shows the shape of site/content.json. Do NOT upload as-is unless you want it to replace the homepage copy. Normally you create/edit this from the admin panel (Site content), and the public page falls back to its built-in copy for any field you leave unset.

hero.tagline: Classical line, street power — one dancer, every style.
hero.intro: From a first hip-hop routine at age five to the men's advanced ballet barre, Gavin moves across breaking, ballet, hip-hop, and contemporary — and he's just getting started.

about.lede: Versatility isn't a side note in Gavin's training — it's the whole point.
paragraphs: Gavin has been dancing since he was five…
From there he kept widening his reach…
He's collected top awards and scholarships along the way…

disciplines.name: Hip-Hop
disciplines.blurb: Where it all began. Groove and musicality.

disciplines.name: Tumbling & Tricks
disciplines.blurb: Advanced tumbling that powers the biggest moments.

journey.title: First steps
journey.body: A group hip-hop routine at Body Expressions.
